secretaryOfState.agency: New Mexico Secretary of State Business Services

hours.regular: Office hours Monday-Friday 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.; Business Services walk-in hours are available Monday-Thursday and the office is closed to in-person Business Services customers on Fridays.

physicalAddresses.label: Business Services Division
physicalAddresses.street: New Mexico Capitol Annex North, 325 Don Gaspar, Suite 300

mailingAddress.street: New Mexico Capitol Annex North, 325 Don Gaspar, Suite 300

renewals.notes: New Mexico LLCs do not have an annual report requirement under the Limited Liability Company Act. Business filings are online-only through the SOS portal; paper business applications are no longer accepted.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Articles of Organization filing fee is $50 per NMSA 1978 § 53-19-63(A).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Application for reservation of a name or transfer of a name reservation is $20 per NMSA 1978 § 53-19-63(H).

sources.name: NMSA 1978 § 53-19 Limited Liability Company Act (SOS compilation)
